features: ADVANCED CVC8.0 DUAL MIC NOISE CANCELLING - The Bluetooth headset built-in HD Mic ENC features advanced CVC8.0 noise cancelling and Digital Signal Processing (DSP) technology for clear and smooth conversations. Qualcomm aptX HD delivers crystal clear audio and natural sound wherever. Ensure clearer and more efficient calls.

BLUETOOTH V5.0 TECHNOLOGY - Equipped with the latest Bluetooth 5.0 technology, this Bluetooth earpiece provides fast and stable paring with iOS Android mobile phones, tablets, laptops, computers, PCs, etc. You can move freely with up to a 33ft (10m) range and enjoy the convenience of connecting 2 devices simultaneously.

ULTRA LARGE BATTERY CAPACITY - C01 Single Ear Wireless Headset support 8 days standby time, 8 hours of continuous talking and 16 hours of music playback time on 1.5 hours single quick charge. The best choice for meeting, on-the-go communication and long-distance travel.

HANDS-FREE CALLING & SIMPLE BUTTON CONTROL - The Bluetooth headphone with mic supports Siri, Google or other Voice Assistants. Easy to Answer/End Calls, Mute Voice, Volume “+/-” and even announce incoming number, allowing you to enjoy true hands-free. (ONLY ALLOW TO MUTE DURING CALL ON CELL PHONES)

COMFORTABLE TO WEAR & 2-YEAR WARRANTY - Flexible to fit both ears. Super lightweight Bluetooth earphone with adjustable ear hook, boom mic can be freely rotated to your preferred angle. Soft Ear tips are available in 3 different sizes to meet your need. We offer 45 days money-back & 24 months warranty.

Previous page Next page 1 All-Day Comfort 2 Wearing Instructions 3 What's in the Box Is there a mute button on it? Yes, Callez C01 Bluetooth headset has microphone mute button. But the mute feature is functional only while you are on calls on cell phones, does not work with computer/laptop. Will this headset work with an android phone? Yes, this Bluetooth earpiece can work with Android iPhone and other leading smartphones, as long as your devices support Bluetooth connection. What is the range of the device from the connected device? The Bluetooth earpiece V5.0 has a range of up to 33ft (10m) on the mobile phone. It will announce you are disconnected when you have moved too far away. Can this activate voice assistant on my iPhone? Yes, press and hold the Mute Button for 2 seconds, you can activate your phone’s default assistant (Siri, Google Assistant, etc.) . How is the battery of this bluetooth earphone? It offers up to 8 hours continuous talking time and 8 days standby time, and it comes with a USB-C fast charging cable and can be fully charged in 1.5 hours.
